title: Dialog component for confirming completion of todos
purpose: Displays a confirmation dialog when users attempt to clear completed todos, allowing them to confirm or cancel the action.
module_context: Exports a React functional component that renders a modal dialog with confirmation and cancellation options, handling keyboard shortcuts and focus management.

steps.content: Initialize a ref for the confirmation button element.
Set focus to the confirmation button when the dialog opens.
Return null if the dialog is not open.
Handle keyboard events for Escape key and Ctrl/Cmd+Enter shortcuts.
Determine the appropriate label for completed todos based on count.
Render the dialog structure with title, message, and action buttons.
